title: synotis atractylidifolia
intro: Synotis atractylidifolia, a plant species native to the Himalayan region, is a type of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and cough. Synotis atractylidifolia is typically prepared as an herbal infusion or decoction for medicinal use.
